parameters.command: =aws s3 cp {{ $('Prepare Backup Config').item.json.backup_path }} s3://{{ $('Prepare Backup Config').item.json.s3_bucket }}/{{ $('Prepare Backup Config').item.json.s3_key }} --storage-class STANDARD_IA && echo 'S3_UPLOAD_SUCCESS' && aws s3 ls s3://{{ $('Prepare Backup Config').item.json.s3_bucket }}/backups/postgresql/ --recursive --human-readable | tail -20 && rm -f {{ $('Prepare Backup Config').item.json.backup_path }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO backup_log (backup_type, filename, s3_key, s3_bucket, file_size, status, created_at)
VALUES (
  'postgresql',
  '{{ $json.backup_filename }}',
  '{{ $json.s3_key }}',
  '{{ $json.s3_bucket }}',
  '{{ $json.backup_size }}',
  '{{ $json.success ? "success" : "failed" }}',
  NOW()
);
